tasksStatus.message: Disable hand pinch detection through OVRInput, which will be deprecated in a future release. If your project utilizes this behavior, please update your project to use the recommended API for detecting hand pinches going forward: OVRHand.GetFingerIsPinching.
Set maximum pixel lights count to 1
Set Texture Quality to Full Res
Enable Anisotropic Filtering on a per-texture basis
When using Virtual Keyboard in your project it's required to enable Render Model Support
When using Virtual Keyboard in your project it's required to enable its capability

Using Stage tracking origin is not recommended for full immersive VR apps, or if you want to have a consistent tracking space for mixed reality experiences under all the cases of no boundaries (i.e. boundaryless), roomscale boundaries, and stationary boundaries.

You can click the 'Apply' button to set the tracking origin to Floor Level, and use a Spatial Anchor to achieve that. Click the Documentation link to find more details.
The Oculus Integration SDK and Meta XR Simulator package versions must match
OpenXR must be added to the XR Plugin active loaders
Subsampled Layout should be enabled to improve GPU performance when foveation is enabled.
When using OpenXR Plugin, at least the Oculus Touch Interaction Profile should be included for full OVRInput support.
Displaying UI without using OVROverlayCanvas will result in less clear UI and less readable text.
Displaying text without using OVROverlayCanvas will result in less readable text.
An Android Manifest file is required
Minimum Android API Level must be at least 32
Target API should be set to 32 as to ensure the latest supported version
Install Location should be set to "Automatic"
Building the ARM64 architecture requires using IL2CPP as the scripting backend
Use ARM64 as target architecture
Apps with Android TV Compatibility enabled are not accepted by the Oculus Store
Optimize Texture Compression: For GPU performance, please use ASTC. In some cases, ETC2 is also a viable solution.
When using Body Tracking in your project it's required to enable its capability in the project config
Automatically request the Body Tracking permission on startup
When using Face Tracking in your project it's required to enable its capability in the project config
Automatically request the Face Tracking permission on startup
When using Eye Tracking in your project it's required to enable its capability in the project config
Automatically request the Eye Tracking permission on startup
Build Target (Android) is supported
We recommend using a stable version for Meta XR Development

Either the Oculus XR (com.unity.xr.oculus) or OpenXR Plugin (com.unity.xr.openxr) package must be installed through the Unity Package Manager. It is recommended to use the OpenXR Plugin (com.unity.xr.openxr) package.
Beginning with v74, it is recommended to use the OpenXR plugin (com.unity.xr.openxr) instead of the OculusXR plugin (com.unity.xr.oculus).
The XR Plug-in Management (com.unity.xr.management) package must be installed through the Unity Package Manager.

It's not recommended to install Oculus XR Plugin and OpenXR Plugin at the same time, which may introduce unintentional conflicts.
Click 'Edit' to open the Package Manager to uninstall one of the plugins. OpenXR Plugin is the recommended plugin to use.
Complete a Data Use Checkup to meet DUC policy requirements. Please ignore if you are not using any Platform SDK APIs.
Set up the application ID and the package name. Please ignore if you are not using any Platform SDK APIs.
When using Scene in your project it's required to enable its capability in the project config

When using Scene in your project, it's required to perform a runtime permission request. Hit Apply to have OVRManager request the permission automatically on app startup. It is recommended to hit Ignore and manage the runtime permission yourself.
Stationary tracking origin can only be used when experimental features are enabled.
Use Default Contact Offset above or equal to 0.01
Use Sleep Threshold above or equal to 0.005
Use Default Solver Iteration below or equal to 8
When using Passthrough in your project it's required to enable its capability in the project config
When using Passthrough in your project it's required to enable it in OVRManager
When enabling the Passthrough capability in your project it's required to use ARM64 as the target architecture
For MR apps it's recommended to disable Virtual Reality Splash Screen (in Player Settings). Otherwise it will result in an inconsistent experience
For MR apps it's recommended to disable Show Splash Screen (in Player Settings). Otherwise it will result in an inconsistent experience
Black System Splash Screen background is prohibited for MR apps
There can only be one active main camera in this scene
There can only be one active audio listener in this scene
When using Shared Spatial Anchor in your project it's required to enable its capability in the project config
Room Mesh is only available to Quest 3 devices
When using Room Mesh in your project it's required to enable its capability in the project config
Hand Tracking must be enabled in OVRManager when using its Building Block
Hand Tracking V2 is required when using the Hand Tracking Building Block
When using Spatial Anchor in your project it's required to enable its capability in the project config
When using Passthrough Building Block as an underlay it's required set the camera background to transparent
All Building Blocks dependencies must be present in the scene
All Building Blocks package dependencies must be present in the scene with valid versions. Missing packages:
The UnityInferenceEngineProvider is missing its runtime model and/or other required files
The UnityInferenceEngineProvider in Object Detection mode requires an NMS Compute Shader
The AI Agent component is missing its provider profile
The Provider is missing required fields
DepthAPI requires Vulkan to be set as the Default Graphics API.
DepthAPI requires Occlusions and Session to be enabled in the OpenXR menu.
DepthAPI requires render mode to be set to Single Instanced (Multiview).
Occlusion is only available on Quest 3 and 3S devices
DepthAPI requires Scene feature to be set to required
DepthAPI requires the Passthrough feature to be enabled

Passthrough Camera Access requires:
1. 'horizonos.permission.HEADSET_CAMERA' permission in AndroidManifest.xml.
2. 'Passthrough Support' set to 'Supported' or 'Required'.

When using Passthrough Camera Access in your project, it's required to perform a runtime permission request. Hit Apply to have OVRManager request the permission automatically on app startup. It is recommended to hit Ignore and manage the runtime permission yourself.
MR Utility Kit recommends Scene Support to be set to "Required"
ImmersiveSceneDebugger prefab reference is missing in MRUK component. Scene debug will be unavailable in Immersive Debugger.
When using Local Matchmaking in your project it's required to enable the Colocation Session capability in the project config
When using Space Sharing in your project it's required to enable the Anchor And Space Sharing Support in the project config
When using Space Sharing in your project it's required to disable LoadSceneOnStartup for MRUK
When using OVRSkeleton components it's required to have OVRBody data provider next to it
Body API is not compatible with simultaneous hands and controllers
When using OVRCustomFace components it's required to have OVRFaceExpressions data provider next to it
Color Space is required to be Linear
Enable Legacy Graphics Jobs. This can help performance if your application is main thread bound.
Manual selection of Graphic API, favoring Vulkan (or OpenGLES3)
Enable Multithreaded Rendering
Use 32Bit Display Buffer
Use Forward Rendering Path
Use Stereo Rendering Instancing
Setting the Intermediate Texture Mode to "Always" might have a performance impact, it is recommended to use "Auto"
SSAO will have some performace impact, it is recommended to disable SSAO
Use Non-Directional lightmaps
Disable Realtime Global Illumination
Consider using GPU Skinning if your application is CPU bound
Please note that OpenXR Plugin (com.unity.xr.openxr) support for Dynamic Resolution is only available from Unity 2022.3.49f1 onwards. Click 'Apply' to disable Dynamic Resolution in this scene.
Enabling Depth Texture may significantly impact performance. It is recommended to disable it when it isn't required in a shader.
Enabling Opaque Texture may significantly impact performance. It is recommended to disable it when it isn't required in a shader.
Using HDR may significantly impact performance. It is recommended to disable HDR.
Using FSR may significantly impact performance. It is recommended to switch Upscaling Filter to Auto.
Using the camera stack may significantly impact performance. It is not recommended to use the camera stack feature.
Use recommended MSAA level for Android
